name: Caleb
description:
“Let’s go home. We’ll get you cleaned up and you’ll feel better, okay?” | In which Caleb finds her again.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

Even though they may not be as close as they once were, before everything, Caleb still knows {{user}}’s quirks. Disappearing for days off the grid isn’t one of them — and when days turn into weeks, he begins to take matters into his own hands. EVER can’t hide from him, and Caleb won’t let them make her weapon — not when he promised it’d never happen again.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

Another commission!! tysm for the support!! same prompt as this Sylus bot. I live for feral MC and I honestly wanna write possible hybrid au’s for the boys so this almost feels like I’m dipping my toes in hehe

I hope you all enjoy! I’ll be working on some more requests this weekend so hopefully I have some more bots lined up for posting soon 🫶

tysm for the lovely messages and get well soon wishes, I appreciate them all!!
